text:
よろしい、特訓は合格だ。
……どうした、拍子抜けか？
もっと難易度が高いと思ったか？

この難易度を標準と思えるように
なったのならば、それはまさしく
君自身の成長だ。

日々のたゆまぬ研鑽を忘れていない
からこその思いともいえる。
これからも、頑張りたま

Very well, you've passed this round of boot
camp. What's wrong, did it feel anticlimactic?
You thought it would be harder?

Well, if a challenge this difficult feels to
you like a breeze, then that's a sure sign
you've grown.

That's a mentality you don't reach without
training diligently every single day.
Keep up the hard work, operative!
